title: first property!
description: Self-reported testimonial captured as a testimonial screenshot. The headline or lead is "first property!". Key hook: first property. OCR content indicates: =i. Wateh (1)   «= Win Hey everyone,   just wanted to come and share a very exciting moment with the group and prove this business model is exciting and will work.
ocrText:
=i. Wateh (1) || «=
Win
Hey everyone, | just wanted to come and share a very exciting moment with the group and prove this
business model is exciting and will work.
I'm currently on vacation in Washington state visiting family and met up with a friend two days ago
who is a real estate agent in the area and who helped sell my house earlier this year. We were just
talking about new business ventures and life and | pitched him my new venture with Airbnb and he
loved the idea soo much we partnered up. And decided to use his beach house as our first property!
We are going 50/50 on the deal and looking to scale very fast after this one is going. It will be
producing $1900(low end) to $3750(high end) for each of us with the 50/50 split. Very excited and
happy I have a property about to be up and running.
This whole thing was a stroke of luck that | found on vacation when | was just getting away from the
daily grind and taking some time with friends and family. But if it weren't for being part of this group
and taught be @Preston S, this would not have been possible!
Keep grinding everyone. Properties are right there and you might not even know it!

ocrText:

Damn bud I'm sorry for such a late response. I've had my head down
working hard. We are doing pretty well in our property (pretty much
booked out until April, except February). I have my open house for my
recent flip on Sunday the 13th. I've pretty much worked 18 hour days for
the last two months between learning our Airbnb process, flipping the
house and my usual car dealership and daycare work. After the 13th my
schedule will be opening back up and plan to acquire another Airbnb
property. So | will be back and very active again. I'd love to catch up and
chat. I see you brought on another coach too. | think that's smart and
would love to one day get involved in that as well if you ever needed any
other help. But let's set up a time to chat in the coming weeks after the
13th. | appreciate you checking in with me and apologize again for the
lack of a timely response.

ocrText:
a Matthew Ellis Watch (5) see
(2) 2d ago in General discussion
Got my 1st one!
Morning Team. Just wanted to give a quick shout out to Preston and all the work gone into this
program. I'm about a week in and just locked up my first deal. Which should be netted me about $3-
Ak profit per month! Super excited to get this going. Followed the details in the program step by step
but made the scripts my own and ran with it. Now to find property #2, then #3! My goal is to have 3
locked up and running before Christmas. With another goal of 5 more by April 1st 2023. Just wanted
to say, if you're new to this, keep going, keep calling, keep emailing and texting properties and
researching markets. M~

working hard. We are doing pretty well in our property (pretty much

house and my usual car dealership and daycare work. After the 13th my

property. So | will be back and very active again. I'd love to catch up and
chat. I see you brought on another coach too. | think that's smart and
would love to one day get involved in that as well if you ever needed any
other help. But let's set up a time to chat in the coming weeks after the
13th. | appreciate you checking in with me and apologize again for the
lack of a timely response.

description: Self-reported testimonial captured as an email screenshot. It centers on Grayson Nichols. The headline or lead is "First Property - Win! oe". Key hook: First Property. OCR content indicates: Update on First Property - Win! oe (ReaD) inbox Grayson Nichols 2:11AM . "A 3
ocrText:
Update on First Property - Win! oe
(ReaD) inbox
Grayson Nichols 2:11AM .
"A 3
tome v
Good afternoon Preston,
| wanted to send you an email before | posted anything in
the group just to let you know how much | appreciate the
work you have put into the course, and that the methods
you teach really work. | have officially locked up my first
property, and have even accomplished things like a delayed
start date and a decreased security deposit!
The landlord was in the process of restoring the house, and
she agreed to let me furnish the house and prepare it while
she finished up repairs on the house. We agreed on a June
1 start date, which gives me over a month to prepare the
property and make it look nice before we go live. The lawn
also needed some work, and she agreed to take whatever |
spent on the lawn / flower beds out of the security deposit.
I'll update you when the listing has gone live, and send you
the link. Please also forward this to Dustin as he was the
one who reviewed my property submission. | really think it's
going to look great when it is all ready, and I'm so excited to
get some bookings. Thanks again for all you do! PS, this
was the first call | made! So it really does work, you just
have to do the research and be confident during the call,
which are both things you teach well in the course.
Have a great weekend!
- Grayson Nichols
